task_updates.executor_notes: Verified the API rename blast radius by searching for dismissShot, dismissedShotIds, and useFinalVideoAvailable across src/. No remaining old-name consumers exist. The hook itself is only imported by TimelineEditor.tsx for runtime use; TimelineCanvas.tsx and ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx continue to receive callbacks via props, and the relevant timeline editor test modules pass with the current prop signatures.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. Runtime hook usage is limited to TimelineEditor.tsx, with useSwitchToFinalVideo.ts and TimelineEditor.test.ts only importing the shared ShotFinalVideo type. TimelineCanvas.tsx and ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx accept callback props with the same shotId/group shapes as before, so the rename did not change their prop contracts. TimelineCanvas.test.tsx and TimelineEditor.test.ts both pass.
